paragraph_or_text_span: Emergency (ASAP) Emergency (within 24 hrs) Urgent / Priority – suggested telephone eye department for triage Condition Anterior Red eye (non traumatic) AACG Painful recent (<2/12) post-op (hypopyon / blebitis / endophthalmitis) Corneal graft rejection. Red eye (traumatic) – if severe Chemical burns (irrigate first) Penetrating injuries. Red eye (non traumatic) Scleritis Infective keratitis Herpes
